features.Description: PP344_ARATH - Experimental evidence at protein level: Swiss-Prot protein existence level 1. Plays a role in the stabilization of the primary polycistronic transcript of the petL operon encoding subunits of the cytochrome b6-f complex. From Arabidopsis thaliana (Mouse-ear cress).
mutant version of attL; recombination site for the Gateway® LR reaction LR Clonase™
β-lactamase; bla; confers resistance to ampicillin, carbenicillin, and related antibiotics

transcription terminator T2 from the E. coli rrnB gene
